home.title: Welcome
home.subtitle: Sign in to access your dashboard, or create an account to get started.

auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a confirmation link. Click it to activate your account, then sign in.
auth.emailSentDescription: If an account exists for that email, you will receive a reset link.
auth.checkEmailConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account
auth.resetLinkSent: Check your email for the reset link
auth.checkEmailPageDescription: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click the link to activate your account, then sign in.
